sprint-planning.title: Sprint Planning
sprint-planning.hint: A team planning the next sprint: reviewing the backlog, estimating story points, discussing capacity, committing to what will be delivered.

code-review.title: Code Review
code-review.hint: An engineer reviewing a teammate's pull request: understanding the change, asking clarifying questions, requesting changes constructively, approving.

bug-investigation.title: Bug Investigation
bug-investigation.hint: An engineer investigating a reported bug: reproducing it, narrowing down the root cause, explaining findings to the team, proposing a fix.

production-incident.title: Production Incident
production-incident.hint: An on-call engineer handling a production incident: acknowledging the alert, assessing impact, communicating status updates, coordinating a fix, writing a postmortem.

architecture-discussion.title: Architecture Discussion
architecture-discussion.hint: Engineers discussing a system design decision: proposing an approach, weighing trade-offs, pushing back with concerns, reaching a decision.

ai-engineering-discussion.title: AI Engineering Discussion
ai-engineering-discussion.hint: AI engineers discussing an LLM system: RAG pipeline design, embedding/vector DB choices, agent workflows, evaluation results, prompt engineering trade-offs.

technical-interview.title: Technical Interview
technical-interview.hint: A candidate in a technical interview: explaining past projects, walking through problem-solving out loud, answering follow-up questions, asking the interviewer questions.

hr-interview.title: HR Interview
hr-interview.hint: A candidate in an HR/behavioral interview: talking about strengths and weaknesses, why they're leaving their current job, salary expectations, culture-fit questions.

pair-programming.title: Asking for Help / Pair Programming
pair-programming.title_vi: Nhờ giúp đỡ / Lập trình cặp đôi
pair-programming.hint: An engineer asking a teammate for help mid-task and pairing with them: explaining what they're stuck on, sharing screen/context, thinking out loud together, splitting the work.
